agent_output:
I've set up the `.env` file with all the environment variables needed for the project based on the `.env.example` template.

**Created `.env` with:**
- API key configurations for 12+ AI providers (NVIDIA NIM, OpenRouter, Mistral, DeepSeek, etc.)
- Local provider configs (LM Studio, Llama.cpp, Ollama)
- Model routing and thinking output settings
- Provider timeouts, rate limits, and proxy settings
- Server auth token (`ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN="freecc"`)
- Messaging platform defaults (Discord)
- Voice transcription settings
- Agent behavior toggles
- Debug/logging options

The project will now be able to run using local providers or any cloud provider once you add the respective API key. The default model is set to `nvidia_nim/nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b`.
